prompt: A dramatic ultra-realistic motorsport action photograph of a modern Formula 1 race car in dark navy with red and yellow accents charging through heavy rain on a soaked circuit, shot from a very low trackside angle near the front-left corner of the car. The car dominates the foreground, with slick aerodynamic bodywork, exposed wet tires throwing up massive sprays of water, glowing red reflections on the wet asphalt, and sharp sponsor-style markings across the nose, front wing, sidepod, and rear wing. Capture the sensation of high speed with subtle motion blur in the background and water streaks, while keeping the car body mostly crisp and detailed. The scene takes place in a packed stadium-like racetrack with 1 main grandstand full of blurred spectators along the left side, 2 bright red illuminated signage boards in the distance, 1 safety fence running parallel to the track, and 1 reflective rain-soaked racing surface stretching toward the camera. Overhead, dense storm clouds fill the sky, creating a moody cinematic atmosphere with cold blue-gray tones contrasted by the car’s vivid warm colors. Emphasize dramatic spray, reflections, realism, tension, and the feeling of a championship race in brutal weather, as if captured on a professional sports telephoto-lens camera with shallow depth of field, high contrast, and editorial motorsport photography styling.
